Available in 10ft, 20ft, and 40ft. Rent or buy. Plug in and start storing.

S2 Key features.Plug and play: Connect to standard power supply. Operational within hours of delivery. No civil construction required.
S2 Key features.Stainless steel interior: Complete stainless steel lining for hygiene compliance. Easy to clean, FSSAI compliant.
S2 Key features.External ramp: External loading ramp for easy loading and unloading without forklifts.
S2 Key features.Anti room: Pre-cooling anti-room prevents heat ingress during loading. Maintains temperature integrity.

S2 Key features.Man trap alarm: Safety alarm system to prevent accidental entrapment inside the container.

S3 Products stored.BODY: Pharmaceuticals · Dairy products · Fruits & vegetables · Frozen food · Meat & seafood · Bakery products · Confectionery · Biological samples · Chemicals

Hero Page.HEADLINE: Freeze it fast. Lock in quality. At your location.
Hero Page.SUBHEADLINE:
Crystal's blast freezer containers bring industrial-grade rapid freezing to your production site.
Down to -40°C. No civil construction. Operational in days.
Hero Page.CTAS: Rent a blast freezer | Buy a blast freezer | Download brochure

S1 Why blast freezing matters.BODY:
Standard freezing is slow. The longer a product takes to freeze, the more ice crystals form and the more cellular damage occurs.
Blast freezing reduces core temperature rapidly, preserving texture, nutrition, colour, and shelf life in a way slow freezing simply cannot.
For seafood, meat, ready meals, and dairy, the difference is visible and measurable.

S2 Specifications & features.Temperature: Down to -40°C. Rapid pull-down from ambient to frozen in hours.
S2 Specifications & features.Capacity: Available in 20ft and 40ft. Up to 10 MT/day freezing capacity.
S2 Specifications & features.Portable: Delivered and installed at your production facility. No civil construction. Plug-and-play.
S2 Specifications & features.Dual machine option: 40ft dual machine configuration for continuous operation and built-in redundancy.

S3 Products.BODY: Seafood & fish · Meat & poultry · Ready meals · Dairy & ice cream · Fruits & vegetables · Bakery products · Processed foods
